description: Proven optimization case studies — spec §6.5. Each entry is a reproducible before/after pair citing a published or in-house source.

id.description: Stable lowercase snake_case identifier; used as filename stem for fixtures

technique.description: Short phrase naming the technique (e.g. 'launch_bounds VGPR reduction')

description.description: 2-4 sentence description of the problem and fix

measured_speedup_range.description: [low, high] inclusive multiplicative speedup factor (e.g. [1.25, 1.40] for 25-40%)

source_citation.description: Publication, AMD doc, or in-house experiment ID

preconditions.description: Structured rules that must hold on the baseline DB for this case to apply

failure_modes.description: Known ways the optimization backfires (e.g. 'register spilling when VGPR < 64')

applies_to_gfx.description: Optional — defaults to all archs if omitted
